name: Pum'kin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. Cream together butter, brown sugar, egg, vanilla, and pumpkin puree until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually mix in dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon) one cup at a time, stirring after each addition.
5. Stir in chocolate chips, raisins, chopped nuts, and M&Ms.
6. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets, leaving space between cookies as they will spread during baking.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until firm and lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
9. Decorate with additional M&Ms immediately, or drizzle with Lemon Glaze.
Lemon Glaze:
1. Combine powdered sugar, grated lemon peel, and lemon juice in a small bowl until smooth. Drizzle over cooled cookies.
